Gets the account type (e.g., Entrant, Organizer, Admin).

Gets the maximum capacity/amount of the event.

Gets the current user stored in the session.

Gets the list of invitations the user has declined.

Gets the event description.

Gets the unique device ID associated with the user.

Gets the email of the entrant.

Gets the event date.

Gets the event ID associated with this entrant.

Gets the event ID associated with this notification.

Gets the name of the event this notification refers to.

Gets the first name of the user.

Gets the entrant ID.

Gets the list of events the user has been invited to.
